sentiment.reasoning: Scheduled maintenance is a routine operational event that typically has no material impact on financial performance.

headlines.headline: Halvav Brands raises full-year guidance citing robust demand

sentiment.reasoning: Raising full-year guidance is a direct and positive signal of improved financial performance and strong market demand.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
